name: who-eats-token
description: Agent workflow plugin for Who Eats Token setup, diagnostics, adapter authoring, and MCP snapshot access.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and diagnose local LLM token monitoring.
interface.longDescription: Use Who Eats Token from Codex with setup, doctor, adapter-authoring skills, plus an MCP server for local snapshot and provider health access. The plugin is an agent workflow layer, not the desktop HUD runtime.
defaultPrompt: Set up Who Eats Token and verify local monitoring.
Diagnose why my token HUD or adapter is not updating.
Create a safe adapter for a new LLM tool.
